title: Canola Industry Statement on Chinaâ€™s Preliminary Ruling on Canadian Canola Seed Imports
content: The Canola Council of Canada (CCC) and Canadian Canola Growers Association (CCGA) are disappointed with preliminary ruling by Chinaâ€™s Ministry of Commerce (MOFCOM) as part of its anti-dumping investigation into Canadian canola seed imports.  In its ruling, MOFCOM announced the imposition of a 75.8% duty, collected in the form of a deposit, on all Canadian canola seed shipments as of August 14, 2025. The preliminary determination and its associated duty create significant additional uncertainty and volatility in the global marketplace.
author: Analysts Account
